---
name: Feature request
about: New protocol flow, new 3GPP node, new command, or educational improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**Which simulator / protocol area?**
- [ ] 4G (S1AP / GTPv2 / Diameter S6a / Gx)
- [ ] IMS (SIP / SDP / Diameter Cx / Rx)
- [ ] 5G (NGAP / SBI / PFCP)
- [ ] Cross-simulator / tooling

**3GPP spec reference (if applicable)**
e.g. TS 36.413 §8.4 — S1 Handover

**What should the feature do?**
Describe the new flow or command. Include the step-by-step message sequence if possible.

**Why is it useful for interview prep / learning?**
What concept does this demonstrate? What interview question does it answer?

**Pcap impact**
Should this produce new packets visible in Wireshark? Which dissector / port?

**Suggested log narration level**
- BEGINNER: plain English description of each step
- ENGINEER: protocol field values, IE names, TS references
- INTERVIEW: Q&A — why does this happen, what does it prove
